meta.title: DEF CON Safe Mode Aerospace Village  - Liz Wharton - Airport Hacking Choose Your Own Adventure
meta.description: Check-in software glitches, payment system data breaches, gate signage ransomware attacks... Airports are an interconnected, mini-smart city of retail, dining, infrastructure, and transportation logistics operated by a hodgepodge of business interests + federal, state, and local entities and agencies. Join an interactive adventure as a passenger navigating the airport to catch a flight before hackers cause chaos, highlighting security pitfalls and risks all based on publicly disclosed incidents.
